summary: Comprehensive testing of double-entry accounting engine - Central Accounting Page with Central Ledger, Debtor Ledger, and Creditor Ledger. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/accounting/central-ledger - Returns entries with summary (total_amount, total_entries)
GET /api/accounting/debtor-ledger - Returns customer balances with summary
GET /api/accounting/creditor-ledger - Returns supplier balances with summary
GET /api/accounting/summary - Returns overall accounting totals (sales, purchases, receipts, payments, receivable, payable)
GET /api/accounting/debtor-ledger/{customer_id}/transactions - Returns customer transaction history
GET /api/accounting/creditor-ledger/{supplier_id}/transactions - Returns supplier transaction history
POST /api/accounting/receipts - Creates receipt entry and updates debtor balance
POST /api/accounting/payments - Creates payment entry and updates creditor balance
Purchase invoice creation generates central_ledger entry with entry_type='purchase'
Purchase invoice creation updates creditor_ledger balance
Central ledger filtering by entry_type works correctly
Central Accounting page loads without errors
Summary cards display Total Sales, Purchases, Receipts, Payments, Receivable, Payable
Three tabs work: Central Ledger, Debtor Ledger (Receivables), Creditor Ledger (Payables)
Creditor Ledger table displays supplier balances with correct columns
Debtor Ledger table displays customer balances
View button on creditor/debtor rows opens transaction history dialog
Transaction history dialog shows Date, Reference, Type, Debit, Credit, Balance columns
Search input filters ledger entries
Refresh button reloads data
critical_code_review_comments: Double-entry accounting engine properly implemented in server.py (lines 504-893)
Purchase accounting integration at line 10925 correctly calls process_purchase_accounting()
Sale accounting integration at line 9110 correctly calls process_sale_accounting()
CentralAccountingPage.js properly implements all three ledger views with data-testid attributes
Minor: React duplicate key warning for 'virtual-tryon' and 'stock-audit' in sidebar (not related to accounting feature)
seed_data_creation: Test purchase invoices created: TEST-ACCT-* series. Test receipt and payment entries created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accounting engine is fully functional. Central Ledger, Debtor Ledger, and Creditor Ledger all working. Test data includes purchases from supplier 'monalisa' and receipts from customer 'bashrat ahmad'. The View button on ledger rows opens transaction history dialog successfully.
